questions.question_text: Is our reported collection rate actually 95% or is the data inflating it?
questions.answer_summary: A 10%+ overstatement in collection rate masks $200K+ in uncollected rent, directly impacting LP distributions and investor confidence.

questions.question_text: Why do we have duplicate payment records?
questions.answer_summary: Duplicate payments inflate collection metrics and can trigger incorrect late-fee waivers, costing $50K+ annually in lost fee revenue.

questions.question_text: Which properties have the worst data quality?
questions.answer_summary: Identifying the 3-5 properties with the most data issues lets us prioritize remediation where investor reporting impact is highest.

questions.question_text: What's the fastest path to trustworthy delinquency numbers?
questions.answer_summary: Accurate delinquency rates are required for quarterly LP reporting — currently understated numbers could trigger covenant concerns when corrected.

questions.question_text: If an investor audits our vacancy numbers, will they hold up?
questions.answer_summary: Vacancy rate discrepancies affect NOI calculations that drive property valuations — a 3% error translates to $1M+ in valuation variance per property.
